title: logania litoralis
intro: Logania litoralis is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a range of ailments, with its medicinal properties attributed to the presence of iridoid glycosides. The health benefits of Logania litoralis include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antispasmodic, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful remedy for digestive issues and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Logania litoralis is often used as a tincture or infused in hot water as a tea, although its use should be approached with caution due to limited scientific research on its effects and potential interactions.
